name: Giant-Killing (Greater)
description:
This weapon features stylized etchings of giants. A giant-killing weapon deals an additional ] damage on a successful Strike against a giant. Mental damage dealt by this weapon ignores the target's mental resistance.

On a critical hit, instead of being Enfeebled 1, the giant must attempt a save with the following effects.

Critical Success The giant is enfeebled 1 until the end of your next turn.

Success The giant is Enfeebled 2 until the end of your next turn and takes ] damage.

Failure The giant is enfeebled 2 for the next minute and takes ] damage.

Critical Failure The giant is Enfeebled 4 for the next minute and takes ] damage.
